---
title: "muninn_hunter.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/sentinel/muninn_hunter.py"
loc: 21
complexity: 2
logic_score: 4.85
style_score: 3.79
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 7.05
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating MuninnHunter, __init__.

## Interaction Protocol
Import MuninnHunter and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.8/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [src.sentinel.coordinator](file://src.sentinel.coordinator)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)

### Exports
- `MuninnHunter`
- `__init__`
- `execute_hunt`
- `select_target`
